creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
> One change I see in the tools, I should probably set ${WWWMODE} to 644 and let 
> the maintainer override any individual files. I'll test that before I roll 
> another diff.

Change it to 444. The running app have no business overwriting its own
files. That way lies security madness.

-- 
-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>
Can't sing. Can't dance. Can handle a sword a little.
